scope: Canonical supported workflows for AI agents and operators. These workflows intentionally use the supported tool registry instead of the full CLI surface.

workflows.name: Orient And Triage
workflows.intent: Start a session with a compact status view, then branch into the right sanctioned workflow.
entry_conditions: Unsure which queue or audit surface currently matters

steps.purpose: Get the compact NC orientation summary.
Inspect review debt when the summary indicates weak-parse pressure.
Inspect the current reprocess queue when targeted reruns are active.
Confirm stale-stage debt when stage freshness is the suspected issue.
Inspect OCR backlog when scanned PDFs are the likely blocker.
Inspect provisional-family load when intake produced unresolved families.

branching.if: Downloaded records are pending import or lineage repairs need to be materialized
Lineage blockers or family-link ambiguity dominate the backlog
Provenance coverage or path-vs-hash uncertainty dominates the backlog
The active bottleneck is finding or advancing missing clean historical documents
Review debt, stale-stage debt, or profile changes require targeted reruns
Provisional families need promotion or cleanup
Scanned PDFs are blocking extraction

workflows.name: Historical Intake And Extract
workflows.intent: Move downloaded NCUC records into mined historical state and extract charges through the supported path.
entry_conditions: New or repaired downloaded NCUC records are ready for intake
Historical state needs to be rebuilt from queued downloads

steps.purpose: Run the primary page-aware intake path.
Fill simple missing tariff_version links before extraction.
Run extraction once historical docs and version links exist.
Check whether extraction materially succeeded.
Inspect resulting review debt after extraction.

branching.if: Lineage blockers remain after intake
Extraction debt now requires selective reruns
New provisional families were created

workflows.name: Lineage Audit
workflows.intent: Diagnose family-link, version-link, and extraction-readiness blockers across NC historical documents.
entry_conditions: Historical documents are not linking cleanly to families or versions
Extraction readiness is blocked by family or version debt

steps.purpose: Get aggregate gap counts and categories.
Separate blockers from warnings at document level.
Review likely family-link recoveries before optional apply.
Repair simple missing version links surfaced by the audit.

branching.if: Family suggestions are applied and repaired discovery rows need rematerialization
The remaining issue is provisional-family ambiguity
The remaining issue is provenance or hash coverage rather than family assignment

workflows.name: Provenance And Coverage Audit
workflows.intent: Audit missing provenance fields and fingerprint/hash coverage without mixing that work into lineage or queue triage.
entry_conditions: Historical versions or discovery links have missing provenance
You need to distinguish path-only coverage from hash-backed coverage

steps.purpose: Audit missing provenance fields and weak discovery linkage.
Measure hash-backed coverage, fingerprint presence, and artifact reuse.
Use blocker-vs-warning context when provenance debt overlaps extraction readiness.

branching.if: Coverage gaps reveal broader lineage blockers
Coverage work reveals the real blocker is missing clean companion documents
Coverage or provenance debt should drive selective reruns

workflows.name: Missing Document Recovery
workflows.intent: Use the sanctioned resumable loop to find, fetch, import, and advance missing clean historical tariff documents.
entry_conditions: A family is known but the clean historical tariff or rider PDF is still missing
Lineage or confidence audits point to document acquisition rather than parser weakness
Deferred missing-document targets need queue-driven remediation

steps.purpose: Search NCUC for likely clean historical document candidates.
Advance the target through fetch, import, bootstrap, and queue stages.
Inspect target-level workflow state and provenance after advancement.
Read the persisted next-action queue, preferably with actionable-only/top filters, and use the included sanctioned command suggestions to resume from durable guidance.
Optionally let the tool execute the single highest-ranked actionable target through its sanctioned workflow.
Optionally execute a bounded batch of top actionable targets when repeated single-step execution would be noisy.
Group still-blocked targets by repairable reason.
Run supported remediations and promote targets that become eligible.

branching.if: Recovered documents now need ordinary intake and extraction follow-through
Recovered documents mainly created targeted repair or review work
The remaining blocker is lineage quality rather than acquisition

workflows.name: Targeted Reprocess
workflows.intent: Use queue-first reruns instead of broad extraction reruns.
entry_conditions: Review backlog, stale-stage debt, or profile changes require selective reruns
A bounded reprocess pass is preferable to rerunning everything

steps.purpose: Rank the next highest-value reprocess targets.
Queue targeted reruns using the supported filters.
Verify the queued work before execution.
Execute the queued repair pass.
Check whether review debt was reduced or changed.
Scope parser-profile reruns before queueing profile-specific work.
Queue reruns caused by a profile change.
Queue specifically stale-stage reruns when that is the dominant issue.

branching.if: Scanned PDFs remain the blocker after reprocess work
Lineage blockers remain after reruns

workflows.name: Provisional Family Review
workflows.intent: Review and resolve provisional families created by intake instead of leaving family ambiguity implicit.
entry_conditions: A lineage audit points to unresolved provisional-family state

steps.purpose: Inspect the current provisional-family backlog.
Review likely family-link recoveries when provisional families came from weak clues.
Rank charged provisional families and surface inferred promotion fields before manual promotion.
Promote a reviewed provisional family to curated state.
Recheck lineage after promotion or cleanup.

branching.if: Promotions or link suggestions changed historical state that now needs rematerialization
The remaining problem is document-level linkage quality

workflows.name: OCR Triage
workflows.intent: Treat OCR as a queue-driven repair path instead of a special-case side workflow.
entry_conditions: Scanned PDFs are blocking extraction or review
The OCR queue needs inspection or execution

steps.purpose: Inspect current OCR queue depth and status.
Queue scanned PDFs that still need OCR.
Execute OCR processing for queued records.
Rerun extraction after OCR materially improves readable content.
Check whether OCR reduced downstream review debt.

branching.if: OCR resolved the blocker and extraction is the next step
OCR revealed broader lineage or provenance issues
